title: Default --expand-limit setting may generate slower code.

features.name: large_width_conditional_wire_replication
features.description: Code should include a large-width wire (>= 1000 bits) with conditional operator using replication on one branch
features.snippet:
parameter NV = 2500;
wire [NV-1:0] d = a ? NV'(0) : {NV{w2}};

features.name: width_cast_streaming_operator
features.description: Code should include a width cast expression using the streaming pack operator NV'(...) to force a specific bit width

features.name: large_vector_slice_extraction
features.description: Code should include extracting a small fixed-width slice from a large replicated vector

features.name: parameterized_scalable_width_design
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter controlling vector width that is used in replication expressions
